name: Aegon I Targaryen
description: Aegon I Targaryen, also known as Aegon the Conqueror, was the first Targaryen king to rule over the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros. With his three powerful dragons and his valiant army, he set out to conquer and unite the warring kingdoms under his rule. Aegon's conquest forever changed the course of Westerosi history, laying the foundation for the Targaryen dynasty's rule and leaving a lasting legacy that would echo through the ages.
creator: Melody_.
